items.name: godui-theme
items.title: GodUI Theme
items.description: Celestial Sapphire design tokens (OKLCH) — colors, radius, fonts, shadows, button scale, and rainbow tokens shared by all GodUI components.

theme.font-sans: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif
theme.font-serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, "Times New Roman", Times, serif
theme.font-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace

items.name: magic-button
items.title: Magic Button
items.description: A tactile 3D push button with an animated rainbow edge and shadow.

items.name: magic-tab
items.title: Magic Tab
items.description: A segmented tab bar where the selected option lifts into a 3D button with an optional rainbow edge.

items.name: magic-input
items.title: Magic Input
items.description: A 3D layered text input that lifts on focus with an optional rainbow edge animation.

items.name: shimmer-button
items.title: Shimmer Button
items.description: A button with an animated shimmering border light that speeds up on hover.

items.name: progress-fold-button
items.title: Progress Fold Button
items.description: A button whose front face folds back to reveal a controlled progress bar while loading.

items.name: mask-button
items.title: Mask Button
items.description: A button whose face wipes away on hover via an animated CSS sprite-sheet mask, revealing the label behind it.

items.name: magnetic-button
items.title: Magnetic Button
items.description: A button whose content is magnetically pulled toward the cursor within a sensor range, springing back on exit.

items.name: progressive-card-reveal
items.title: Progressive Card Reveal
items.description: A vertical stack of cards where one card expands to its full view while the rest collapse to compact pills, animating the morph between them.

items.name: aurora-text
items.title: Aurora Text
items.description: Gradient text with a rainbow aurora that drifts across the letters.

items.name: elastic-text
items.title: Elastic Text
items.description: Variable-font text whose weight springs up under an automatic spotlight or the pointer.

items.name: text-animate
items.title: Text Animate
items.description: Staggered text entrance animations (fade, blur, slide) by character, word, or line.

items.name: highlighter
items.title: Highlighter
items.description: Hand-drawn rough-notation annotations (highlight, underline, box, circle) over text.

items.name: number-ticker
items.title: Number Ticker
items.description: Animates a number to its target value with spring physics when scrolled into view.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: An infinite, seamless scrolling row or column of content that pauses on hover.

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command Palette
items.description: A ⌘K command menu with fuzzy filtering, keyboard navigation, and a spring-tracked active highlight.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: Stacked, swipe-dismissible toasts with an imperative toast() API and auto-dismiss.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: A draggable bottom or side sheet with rubber-band physics, flick-to-dismiss, scrim, and scroll lock.

items.name: animated-testimonials
items.title: Animated Testimonials
items.description: A testimonial carousel with a shuffling image stack, word-by-word quote reveal, and autoplay.

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: A macOS-style dock whose items magnify with spring physics as the pointer moves across them.

items.name: animated-tooltip
items.title: Animated Tooltip
items.description: A tooltip that springs in and tilts in 3D as the pointer moves across its trigger.

items.name: bento-grid
items.title: Bento Grid
items.description: A modular bento layout of mixed-size cards that stagger in on scroll and lift with a spotlight on hover.

items.name: scroll-reveal
items.title: Scroll Reveal
items.description: Reveals its children with a spring as they scroll into view, with optional scroll-velocity skew.

items.name: swipe-deck
items.title: Swipe Deck
items.description: A physics, Tinder-style swipeable card deck with throw-to-dismiss, directional intent, and keyboard controls.

items.name: image-accordion
items.title: Image Accordion
items.description: Horizontal image panels that expand on hover to reveal their caption — an elegant, space-efficient gallery.

items.name: card-swap
items.title: Card Swap
items.description: A 3D stack of cards that cycles through a showcase loop, with pointer parallax and spring re-flow.

items.name: scroll-stack
items.title: Scroll Stack
items.description: Pinned cards that scale, recede, and stack as the page scrolls — the premium feature-reveal section.

items.name: scroll-text-reveal
items.title: Scroll Text Reveal
items.description: Kinetic typography that scrubs each word from dim to sharp as the paragraph scrolls through view — reverses cleanly on scroll-up.

items.name: liquid-image
items.title: Liquid Image
items.description: A premium hover effect that ripples and distorts an image like liquid, intensifying with cursor speed.

items.name: text-scramble
items.title: Text Scramble
items.description: Characters cycle through random glyphs and resolve into the target text — a decrypt / matrix reveal.

items.name: particle-dissolve
items.title: Particle Dissolve
items.description: Text or an image is sampled into particles that scatter and reform — a dramatic entrance or transition.

items.name: spotlight-reveal
items.title: Spotlight Reveal
items.description: A cursor-following flashlight that cuts through the top layer to expose a hidden layer beneath.

items.name: image-trail
items.title: Image Trail
items.description: Images spawn along the pointer's path, pop in, and drift away — the signature portfolio hover effect.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: A card with a radial spotlight glow that follows the pointer, optionally lighting the border.

items.name: border-beam
items.title: Border Beam
items.description: An animated beam of light that travels around the border of its container.

items.name: liquid-glass-card
items.title: Liquid Glass Card
items.description: A glass panel that refracts the content behind it with a mouse-tracked specular highlight.

items.name: liquid-glass-lens
items.title: Liquid Glass Lens
items.description: A circular glass lens that floats over your content and follows the cursor, refracting everything beneath it.

items.name: pixel-grid
items.title: Pixel Grid
items.description: A grid of flickering squares with an optional cursor spotlight that lights up nearby pixels.

items.name: dynamic-island
items.title: Dynamic Island
items.description: An Apple-inspired pill that springs between size presets while its content cross-fades.

items.name: tilt-card
items.title: Tilt Card
items.description: A card that tilts in 3D toward the pointer with parallax depth and a specular glare.

items.name: holographic-card
items.title: Holographic Card
items.description: A trading-card holo effect — iridescent foil, specular glare, and glitter that tilt and shift with the pointer or device gyroscope.

items.name: animated-beam
items.title: Animated Beam
items.description: An animated gradient beam that travels along a path connecting two separate nodes.

items.name: globe
items.title: Globe
items.description: A draggable, auto-rotating WebGL globe with glowing location markers.

items.name: orbiting-circles
items.title: Orbiting Circles
items.description: Icons that orbit a center point on a configurable ring, staying upright as they travel.

items.name: lamp
items.title: Lamp
items.description: A conic-gradient lamp that ignites and reveals a headline as it scrolls into view.

items.name: confetti
items.title: Confetti
items.description: A physics-based confetti burst with an imperative fire API for celebratory moments.

items.name: encrypted-card
items.title: Encrypted Card
items.description: A card whose surface hides a live stream of scrambling ciphertext, revealed only through a soft spotlight that follows the pointer.

items.name: terminal
items.title: Terminal
items.description: An animated terminal window that types out a scripted sequence of commands and output, with window chrome and a blinking caret.

items.name: spin-viewer
items.title: Spin Viewer
items.description: A 360-degree product viewer — drag to spin an object through a sequence of frames, with optional idle auto-rotate and a touch-friendly hint.

items.name: otp-input
items.title: OTP Input
items.description: A segmented one-time-code input with auto-advance, paste-to-fill, a traveling caret, and error shake.

items.name: avatar-group
items.title: Avatar Group
items.description: Overlapping avatars that fan apart on hover, with a +N overflow chip.

items.name: scroll-progress
items.title: Scroll Progress
items.description: A spring-smoothed reading indicator — a pinned top bar or a fading back-to-top ring.

items.name: image-compare
items.title: Image Compare
items.description: A draggable before/after slider with clip-path reveal, keyboard support, and a pulsing handle hint.

items.name: segmented-control
items.title: Segmented Control
items.description: An iOS-style selector with a sliding pill that springs between options.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A disclosure list with spring height animation, rotating chevrons, and single or multiple open modes.

items.name: floating-toolbar
items.title: Floating Toolbar
items.description: A context toolbar that springs into view with magnetic, morphing action buttons.

items.name: stack-badge
items.title: Stack Badge
items.description: A tech-stack wall of monochrome logo chips that stagger in on scroll and lift into their full brand color with a soft glow on hover; ships 20 built-in tech logos plus custom items.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: A step indicator with a spring-filled progress line and a number-to-checkmark morph.

items.name: resizable-header
items.title: Resizable Header
items.description: A sticky navbar that springs into a compact, blurred floating pill as you scroll, with a shared-element active indicator.

items.name: mega-menu
items.title: Mega Menu
items.description: A Vercel-style navigation menu with a direction-aware highlight and a panel that springs and height-morphs between triggers.

items.name: breadcrumbs
items.title: Breadcrumbs
items.description: A breadcrumb trail with hover-fill pills, animated path changes, and an overflow that collapses into an expandable popover.

items.name: filter-bar
items.title: Filter Bar
items.description: A faceted filter bar with searchable multi-select popovers, count badges, and active filters that spring in and out as chips.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: An accessible dropdown that springs open from its trigger edge, with submenus, shortcuts, separators, and keyboard navigation.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: A right-click menu that springs from the cursor point and flips to stay in the viewport, with shortcuts and destructive actions.

items.name: tab-bar
items.title: Tab Bar
items.description: A mobile bottom navigation where a shared-element blob slides under the active tab and the icon gives a haptic-style pop.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: A type-ahead autocomplete with staggered result reveal, highlighted matches, keyboard navigation, and an async loading state.

items.name: prompt-composer
items.title: Prompt Composer
items.description: An AI input box with an auto-growing textarea, attachment chips, an inline model picker, and a send button that morphs into a stop control while streaming.

items.name: conversation-thread
items.title: Conversation Thread
items.description: A streaming AI chat surface where messages spring in, tokens reveal with a blinking caret, hover actions fade in, and the view auto-sticks to the latest message.

items.name: cover-flow
items.title: Cover Flow
items.description: A physics 3D cover flow — the centered slide faces front while neighbours rotate away in perspective, with momentum drag and snap.

items.name: inertia-gallery
items.title: Inertia Gallery
items.description: A horizontal gallery you throw with the pointer — momentum carries it, it rubber-bands at the ends, and slides scale, blur, and fade with distance from center.

items.name: morph-gallery
items.title: Morph Gallery
items.description: A thumbnail grid where a tile morphs into a fullscreen detail view via a shared-element transition, with swipe and keyboard navigation.

items.name: orbit-carousel
items.title: Orbit Carousel
items.description: Slides ride an arc and rotate around a pivot, tilting and receding with angular distance from the front, with momentum drag and snap.

items.name: agent-timeline
items.title: Agent Timeline
items.description: A vertical timeline of agent steps with live status, a spring-filled connector, and collapsible reasoning or tool-output bodies that morph open.

items.name: prompt-suggestions
items.title: Prompt Suggestions
items.description: Animated starter prompts for AI empty states that stagger in, lift on hover, and feed straight into the composer when chosen.

items.name: source-citations
items.title: Source Citations
items.description: Inline numbered citation pills that spring out a rich preview card on hover, plus a collapsible source list for AI answers.

items.name: live-cursors
items.title: Live Cursors
items.description: Smoothly interpolated multiplayer cursors with trailing name flags and optional cursor-chat, plus a self-driving simulated-peer mode.

items.name: presence-facepile
items.title: Presence Facepile
items.description: Live avatars with animated status rings, spring join/leave, and a +N overflow that expands into a presence list.

items.name: comment-pin
items.title: Comment Pin
items.description: Figma-style annotation pins that spring in over any surface and expand into a threaded comment popover with a reply field.

items.name: notification-inbox
items.title: Notification Inbox
items.description: A Linear-style notification center with time-bucketed groups, unread accent rails, swipe-to-archive, mark-all-read, and a polished empty state.

items.name: flow-field
items.title: Flow Field
items.description: Particles streaming along an evolving noise vector field, leaving silky fading trails. Paints its own themed background.

items.name: blueprint-grid
items.title: Blueprint Grid
items.description: A technical blueprint lattice — ruled lines, a dot matrix, or a perspective floor — with a diagonal light sweep and a cursor spotlight. Pure CSS.

items.name: topographic-drift
items.title: Topographic Drift
items.description: Slowly drifting topographic contour lines — a living elevation map drawn with marching squares on a Canvas.

items.name: liquid-metaballs
items.title: Liquid Metaballs
items.description: Gooey blobs that drift, collide, and merge under an SVG goo filter, with an optional cursor blob. Per-instance filter id.

items.name: light-rays
items.title: Light Rays
items.description: Volumetric god-rays that slowly sweep and breathe, with optional film grain. Pure CSS.

items.name: warp-starfield
items.title: Warp Starfield
items.description: A depth starfield you fly through — stars stream toward the viewer with cursor parallax and an optional hyperspace warp.

items.name: hold-confirm-button
items.title: Hold Confirm Button
items.description: Press and hold to confirm a destructive action; a radial fill commits at 100% and releasing early cancels.

items.name: slide-confirm-button
items.title: Slide Confirm Button
items.description: A drag-to-confirm thumb for high-stakes actions that snaps past a threshold and springs back otherwise.

items.name: gooey-fab
items.title: Gooey FAB
items.description: A floating action button that gooey-morphs to extrude its satellite actions like liquid metaballs.

items.name: voice-orb
items.title: Voice Orb
items.description: A Siri-style audio-reactive orb that breathes when idle, pulses while listening, and swells with the voice as it speaks.

items.name: morphing-dialog
items.title: Morphing Dialog
items.description: A card that physically morphs into a modal through a shared layout, then springs back on close.

items.name: reorder-list
items.title: Reorder List
items.description: A drag-to-reorder list where items lift on grab, spring to place, and neighbours flow around them.

items.name: fluid-cursor
items.title: Fluid Cursor
items.description: A spring-lagged blend-mode cursor that trails the pointer and swells over interactive elements.

items.name: world-map
items.title: World Map
items.description: A dotted world map that draws animated arcs between locations, with pulsing endpoint pins.

items.name: gravity
items.title: Gravity
items.description: A physics playground where elements fall, pile, collide, and can be dragged and flung.

items.name: hero-parallax
items.title: Hero Parallax
items.description: A scroll-driven grid of cards that drift in alternating directions on a tilted perspective plane.

items.name: scroll-timeline
items.title: Scroll Timeline
items.description: A scrollytelling timeline whose progress line grows as you scroll, revealing entries with sticky labels.

items.name: container-scroll
items.title: Container Scroll
items.description: A device frame that un-tilts from a 3D perspective and scales to rest as you scroll — the classic product hero.

items.name: three-d-marquee
items.title: 3D Marquee
items.description: A perspective grid of images whose columns drift in alternating directions on a tilted plane.

items.name: sticky-scroll
items.title: Sticky Scroll
items.description: A pinned two-column reveal where scrolling the text steps a synced visual panel through each item.

items.name: beam-draw
items.title: Beam Draw
items.description: SVG beams that draw themselves along scroll progress with a soft glow.

items.name: app-showcase
items.title: App Showcase
items.description: A realistic iPhone or Android device frame that shows your app on screen, with scroll, loop, carousel, and cluster interactions.

items.name: store-badge
items.title: Store Badge
items.description: App Store and Google Play download badges with light/dark finishes, a hover sheen, and an optional scan-to-download QR popover.
